subcodes.first_line: O thou who supplicatest unto God! What shall I write, when my heart is steeped in utmost sorrow and my spirit is wrapped in deepest regret [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متضرع الی الله چه نویسم که دل در نهایت تاثر است و روح در غایت تحسر که با
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
